title: Edinburgh Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is hitting Edinburgh, with a Z-Score of -3.03. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Edinburgh are extreme, with a high humidity level of 77% and moderate winds of 18.4 km/h.
The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 11.6 GG, indicating a significant need for heating, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 0.0 GG.
This cold snap is expected to have a major impact on various sectors, including agriculture, logistics, and energy.
conclusion: Close monitoring of the situation is required to mitigate the effects of this extreme weather event.
